LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 10, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-10-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

IS GRANTED. COUNSEL TO PREPARE AN ORDER ON THE APPLICABLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. ORDER TO INCLUDE THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND WILL BE EFFECTIVE UPON THE FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 29 TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6C AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE PLEADING (FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT) AT ISSUE. PLEASE PROVIDE A COPY OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. MS. GRIFFIN HAS NOT PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE THAT GAIC IS DIRECTLY LIABLE FOR THE ACTS OF EURO AUTO IMPORTS, INC. TO THE EXTENT THAT GAIC MAY BE LIABLE PER VEHICLE CODE 11711, MS. GRIFFIN IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; MS. GRIFFIN HAS STATED THAT SHE WILL NOT PURSUE THIS CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST GAIC. FOR THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ASSERT A CLAIM ON THE BOND PURSUANT TO VEHICLE CODE 11711(A). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. WHETHER ANY DEFENDANT HAD AN AGENCY RELATIONSHIP WITH ANOTHER DEFENDANT IS A QUESTION OF FACT THAT IS NOT A PROPER SUBJECT OF A MOTION TO STRIKE. THE BALANCE OF THE MOTION IS THE SUBJECT OF THE DEMURRER ON CALENDAR FOR THE SAME DATE AS THIS MOTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan L. Martini, Esq. of Sheueman Martini Tabari Zenere & Garvin, Tel. 408.288.9700, counsel for defendant, and moving party via Court Call;
Alisa A. Givental, Esq. of Severson & Werson; Tel. 415.398.3344, for defendant Wells Fargo via Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: ALAN L. MARTINI, ESQ.'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT EURO AUTO IMPORTS, INC. is granted. Counsel to prepare an order on the applicable Judicial Council form. Order to include the next hearing date and will be effective upon the filing of the proof of service. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. The demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Ms. Griffin has not pled sufficient facts to allege that GAIC is directly liable for the acts of Euro Auto Imports, Inc. To the extent that GAIC may be liable per Vehicle Code 11711, Ms. Griffin is granted leave to amend, if she can do so in good faith. The demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend; Ms. Griffin has stated that she will not pursue this cause of action against GAIC. For the third cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to plead sufficient facts to assert a claim on the bond pursuant to Vehicle Code 11711(a). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. Whether any defendant had an agency relationship with another defendant is a question of fact that is not a proper subject of a motion to strike. The balance of the motion is the subject of the demurrer on calendar for the same date as this motion. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
